description_long: This object is a small, painted figurine resembling an ancient Egyptian shabti doll, with a mummiform body and detailed facial features. The doll is adorned with a black wig, a painted necklace, and intricate hieroglyphic patterns running vertically down the front and back of its body. The face is painted with dark eyes, eyebrows, and lips, giving it a lifelike expression. The arms are crossed over the chest, typical of shabti figures, and the entire surface is finished in muted tones of white, gold, black, and red. The back of the doll also features painted details, including a grid-like pattern at the shoulders and more hieroglyphs. The overall appearance suggests it is made from a solid, possibly ceramic or plaster material, and is small enough to be easily held in one hand.
description: A small, painted ancient Egyptian-style shabti doll with crossed arms, detailed facial features, and hieroglyphic decorations in white, gold, black, and red.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, crossed arms, necklace, and vertical hieroglyphs on the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the wig, and the side hieroglyphic patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the wig, a grid-like pattern at the shoulders, and vertical hieroglyphs down the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, wig, and side hieroglyphs.
attribute_clothing_style: Ancient Egyptian mummiform garment with painted necklace and hieroglyphic patterns in gold, black, and red on a white base, typical of shabti figures.
attribute_pose: Body is upright and rigid with arms crossed over the chest, legs together and straight, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with painted eyes open, straight eyebrows, and closed lips.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, black wig extending to the shoulders, typical of ancient Egyptian style.
